commands.repair_reason: - The remaining action is maintainer judgment on runtime API compatibility and whether local proof is enough for large remote-provider backfills.; Cleared: The diff is limited to TypeScript memory manager/provider adapter/test changes and does not alter dependencies, workflows, package scripts, credentials, or supply-chain surfaces. commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an opt-in source-wide batching path for memory embedding runtimes, enables it for OpenAI, Gemini, and Voyage, and adds regression coverage for cross-file and compatibility batching.

PR surface: Source +189, Tests +157. Total +346 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible because dirty memory and session sync still call indexFile per file, and embedChunksWithBatch only submits the chunks passed for that one entry.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining action is maintainer judgment on runtime API compatibility and whether local proof is enough for large remote-provider backfills.
